promotion_rule: challenger ROC-AUC >= champion ROC-AUC + min_roc_auc_improvement AND recall >= min_recall_threshold AND precision >= min_precision_threshold

rationale.recall_floor: Churn prediction favors recall — missing a churner (false negative) costs their entire lifetime value, while a false alarm (false positive) costs only a retention offer. 0.65 ensures we catch at least 2 out of 3 churners.
rationale.precision_floor: With ~5% base churn rate, precision of 0.15 means flagged customers are 3x more likely to churn than random. Prevents models that flag everyone to game recall.
rationale.roc_auc_delta: Challenger must be meaningfully better overall, not just a rounding error improvement.
